h1: Cosmo, the Fireplace for Every Room
h2: Traditional or Modern Fireplace? How We Chose the Right Look for Our New Construction Home

paragraphs: Meet the newly refreshed Cosmo, a perfectly contemporary fireplace that’s always in style. Already a classic, this product now offers additional features and options that bring it to the next level. It’s a fireplace that will maintain its looks and performance for years to come.

Most newer homes are designed with limited wall space because of their open floor plans, so homeowners must place the TV and fireplace in separate locations. With the Cosmo, you can have it all: A clean wall line and a comfortable viewing height, with these two home focal points in the same space.

The beauty of a Cosmo fireplace can be enjoyed year-round, thanks again to the SmartWall TV Kit or other heat management solutions. You can direct heat toward any area of the house where it’s needed, up to 20 feet away, or you can simply move up to 40 percent of the heat outside. With these technologies, there’s no climate or time of year that can keep you from enjoying the relaxation and beauty a fire brings.

Like other Heat & Glo fireplaces, the Cosmo can be operated wirelessly with IntelliFire Touch Controls. Select from the IntelliFire app, touchscreen remote control or wireless wall switch for a solution that fits your lifestyle.

Available in two sizes (32 and 42 inches), Cosmo can match your home’s interior design, and even your changing mood. The contemporary linear design and long ribbon flame complement your choice of surround finish including bronze, black, ebony, graphite, fog gray and stainless steel. Then choose to burn one of seven media, including traditional logs, driftwood, river rocks or colorful glass. The LED lighting display and color can be tailored to your mood, too. Looking for design inspiration? Check out our Real-Life Installations board on Pinterest for ideas.
Ready to see the Cosmo burning in person? Find a dealer near you or request a consultation.
Blogger and new home buyer Rachael Dorr walks us through her fireplace selection process.
TVs and fireplaces share the most attention-getting spots in the home. Thanks to heat management technology, they can be installed in the same place.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
